title: If your favorite Evangelion charcter was real
display_title: If your favorite Evangelion charcter was real
wikitext:
[]: If your favorite Evangelion charcter was real....             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:04 pm What would YOU do? I haven't an idea. How about you guys?

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:07 pm We only get one? Dayum...I have to think about this for a bit...

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Wed Jul 19, 2006 7:10 pm Whoever it was, he or she could probably use a big hug.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:15 pm Several of the characters might need some emergency surgery to make their bodies anatomically possible. Seriously, though, I wonder how some of them would live without their powers. Imagine Gendo or Fuyutski without their discoveries, for instance.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Jul 19, 2006 9:52 pm People like Gendo would probably become a gangster of some sort, and finally die in a gang war.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jul 20, 2006 1:13 am Well... I'm in a confusion, since my favourites are Ayanami, Asuka and Kaoru... They're great guys. Well, I guess they would be exchange students (I don't know the proper phrase here, so sorry if this is not good). It'd be great to have long talks with Kaoru, be mocked by Asuka (I just love as she pisses off people, and I'm 70% resistant already ) and the best would be to talk with Ayanami. I don't like these questions. They make me dream... :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 20, 2006 1:18 am Kaysow wrote: Whoever it was, he or she could probably use a big hug.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 20, 2006 2:10 am Ojisan, you're not good enough for Asuka. Kaji-san's the only cool guy. Hmm, in "real life", maybe Yui and Gendo would become teachers like their sensei. Yui would teach genetics stuff, and Gendo would teach economics. Kozo would teach whatever, since his profession doesn't exist in real life. I'd become an exchange student if only to be in one class with each of them, and fail all three due to the total suckiness of my Japanese. Oh yeah, and I'd stalk Misato's dad, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 20, 2006 2:15 am Reichu wrote: Ojisan, you're not good enough for Asuka. Kaji-san's the only cool guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 20, 2006 5:38 pm well if it was kaworu i would marry him and have sex with him if it was Touji I would marry him and help him resolve his anger issues and go visit his kid sister if it was kensuke I would marry him then he would help me fix my computer

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jul 20, 2006 5:43 pm If Rei were real I'd send her to therapy and take out a restraining order on Gendo so he couldn't go near her. If Keel were real I'd give him a hug and he'd be my pet cyborg. He'd carry all my heavy stuff and ward off horny frat boys.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 20, 2006 5:46 pm If it were Shinji I would reunite him w/ Gendo and make Gendo be nice and i would bring Yui back to life... Then I would marry Shinji and kill gendo

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Fri Jul 21, 2006 11:02 am Mr. Tines wrote: Just as well - I wouldn't want her molesting me,

[]:             Quote Post by Rei_Rocks » Fri Jul 21, 2006 1:52 pm If Rei was real I'd fall in love with her, and hope she'd fall in love wth me. If so we'd merry and then I'd beat the crap out of Gendou.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 21, 2006 2:29 pm darth_mark wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: Just as well - I wouldn't want her molesting me,

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jul 21, 2006 2:37 pm If my favorate eva character was real I'd feel a deep swell of pittly for that bastard having to live with issues like that

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Jul 21, 2006 3:33 pm Kaworu would taste like candy...

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Sun Jul 23, 2006 5:26 am Were Lilith real, I'd be able to take over the Vatican and sit on the throne of the Holy See instead. Churches everywhere would be in shock.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jul 23, 2006 8:31 am Kaworu would make an excellent police standoff negotiator. He can fly, he's bulletproof and he's nice to a fault.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 23, 2006 11:55 am I think I'd bring them onto the Dr. Phil show.
